form.formComment: Resumes racing after a long spell. Only one run when raced on the pace when 3rd of 12 at this track on August 16 over 1600m, 2.25 len behind Suspended Sentence carrying 60.5kg at $9. Nicely placed to break through.

form.formComment: Lining up for just third start. At big odds at debut, of 9 at Kempton Park All Weather on March 2 over 2400m, 30 len behind Charles Darnay with 52.5kg at $41. Last start ran last in a small field at Wolverhampton on March 23 over 1900m, 17 len behind Hard To Believe carrying 57kg at $201. More improvement needed to be competitive.
